name: India
description: India offers a diverse range of visas for travelers worldwide. The e-Tourist visa allows stays up to 60 days with double entry for tourism and recreation.

name: United States
description: The United States offers B1/B2 visitor visas for business and tourism purposes. Applicants must schedule an interview at the US Embassy and demonstrate strong ties to their home country.

name: United Kingdom
description: The UK Standard Visitor Visa permits tourism, business activities, and short-term study for up to 6 months. Multiple-entry visas valid for 2, 5, or 10 years are available for frequent travelers.

name: Canada
description: Canada issues visitor visas for tourism and business purposes, typically valid for up to 10 years or until passport expiry. Biometrics and medical exams may be required depending on the applicant's country of origin.

name: Australia
description: Australia's Visitor Visa (Subclass 600) allows tourism and business visitor activities. The eVisitor visa is available for eligible passport holders for short-term stays up to 3 months.

name: United Arab Emirates
description: The UAE offers tourist visas valid for 30 or 90 days for visitors. Dubai and Abu Dhabi serve as major global hubs, making UAE visas essential for business travelers and tourists alike.

name: Singapore
description: Singapore offers electronic visas for tourism and business purposes. Many nationalities enjoy visa-free entry for up to 30 days, while others require a pre-approved visa before travel.

name: Malaysia
description: Malaysia offers e-Visa and visa-on-arrival facilities for many nationalities. The country is a popular Southeast Asian destination for both tourism and business conferences.

name: Thailand
description: Thailand offers visa-on-arrival for many nationalities and e-Visa options for longer stays. The Tourist Visa allows single or multiple entries for up to 60 days per visit.

name: Vietnam
description: Vietnam offers e-Visa for citizens of many countries for tourism and business visits. The visa is valid for up to 90 days with single or multiple entries.

name: Indonesia
description: Indonesia offers visa-on-arrival for many nationalities at major airports and seaports. The B211 Business Visa allows for social and business activities throughout the archipelago.

name: Philippines
description: The Philippines offers visa-free entry for many nationalities for up to 30 days. Longer tourist visas and business visas are available through application at Philippine embassies and consulates.

name: China
description: China requires a visa for most foreign nationals for tourism, business, and study purposes. The L Visa covers tourism while the M Visa is designed for business-related travel.

name: Japan
description: Japan issues tourist and business visas typically valid for up to 90 days. Multiple-entry visas are available for eligible applicants with valid travel history and sufficient financial means.

name: South Korea
description: South Korea offers visa-free entry for many nationalities and e-Visa options for tourism. The C-3-9 Tourist Visa allows stays up to 90 days for leisure and sightseeing.

name: France
description: France is part of the Schengen Area, allowing visa holders to travel across 27 European countries. The Schengen visa permits stays up to 90 days within any 180-day period.

name: Germany
description: Germany issues Schengen visas for short-term stays up to 90 days for tourism and business. It is also a popular destination for work and study visas due to its strong economy.

name: Italy
description: Italy offers Schengen visas for tourism, business, and cultural visits. The country is one of the most visited destinations globally, known for its rich history, art, and cuisine.

name: Spain
description: Spain issues Schengen visas for short-term tourism and business travel. The country's vibrant culture, beaches, and business hubs make it a popular European destination.

name: Netherlands
description: The Netherlands is a Schengen member state offering tourist and business visas for short stays. Amsterdam serves as a major European entry point for international travelers.

name: Switzerland
description: Switzerland is a Schengen country offering visas for tourism and business purposes. Known for its stunning Alps and banking sector, it attracts both leisure and corporate travelers.

name: Sweden
description: Sweden offers Schengen visas for tourism and business visits up to 90 days. The country is known for its innovation, design, and high quality of life.

name: Norway
description: Norway is part of the Schengen Area and issues visas for tourism and business travel. The country is famous for its fjords, northern lights, and oil industry.

name: Brazil

name: Argentina

name: South Africa
